title: Modern Retail Podcast: What it takes to build a true lifestyle brand
description: The latest episode of the Modern Retail Podcast — recorded live at the Modern Retail Marketing Summit in Huntington Beach, California — gets into what it means to be a lifestyle brand, featuring Mandy Fry of Z Supply.
title_en: Modern Retail Podcast explores building authentic lifestyle brands with Z Supply's Mandy Fry
summary_ko: Modern Retail 팟캐스트에서 Z Supply의 Mandy Fry와 함께 진정한 라이프스타일 브랜드 구축에 대해 논의했습니다. Modern Retail Marketing Summit에서 라이브로 녹음된 에피소드입니다. 라이프스타일 브랜드의 의미와 구축 방법에 대한 인사이트를 제공합니다.
summary_en: Modern Retail Podcast featured a discussion on building authentic lifestyle brands with Mandy Fry from Z Supply. The episode was recorded live at the Modern Retail Marketing Summit in California. The conversation explored what it truly means to be a lifestyle brand and how to build one effectively.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 단순한 제품 판매를 넘어 라이프스타일과 가치관을 반영하는 브랜드 구축이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must move beyond product sales to build brands that reflect lifestyle and values for deeper customer connection.
key_points: Live podcast discussion on lifestyle brand building strategies
Featured Z Supply as case study for authentic brand development
Recorded at Modern Retail Marketing Summit for industry insights
one_line_insight_ko: 라이프스타일 브랜드 구축은 D2C 성공의 핵심 차별화 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Building a lifestyle brand is a key differentiation strategy for D2C success.

title: The Weekly Closeout: Pat McGrath Labs exits bankruptcy, GameStop bets on ‘retro’
description: The cosmetics company forged a deal with GDA Luma, while the gaming retailer is expanding its assortment of older products nationwide.
title_en: Pat McGrath Labs exits bankruptcy through GDA Luma deal while GameStop expands retro gaming
summary_ko: 화장품 브랜드 Pat McGrath Labs가 GDA Luma와의 거래를 통해 파산상태에서 벗어났습니다. 한편 GameStop은 레트로 게임 제품 라인을 전국적으로 확장하고 있습니다. 두 사례 모두 브랜드 회생과 새로운 시장 기회 포착을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Cosmetics brand Pat McGrath Labs successfully exited bankruptcy through a strategic deal with GDA Luma. Meanwhile, GameStop is expanding its retro gaming product assortment nationwide. Both cases demonstrate brand recovery and new market opportunity identification.
so_what_ko: 브랜드 위기 상황에서도 전략적 파트너십과 시장 트렌드 활용을 통해 회생 기회를 만들 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Strategic partnerships and market trend leverage can create recovery opportunities even during brand crises.
key_points: Pat McGrath Labs exits bankruptcy through GDA Luma partnership
GameStop expanding retro gaming products nationwide
Examples of brand recovery and market pivot strategies
one_line_insight_ko: 위기 상황의 브랜드도 전략적 파트너십으로 재기 기회를 찾을 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Brands in crisis can find recovery opportunities through strategic partnerships.

title: Retailers could close more than 40K stores in the next 5 years
description: Tariffs and immigration policies are weighing on the industry and could drive even more closures, UBS analysts found.
title_en: UBS predicts over 40,000 retail store closures in next five years due to policy pressures
summary_ko: UBS 분석가들은 향후 5년간 4만 개 이상의 소매점이 문을 닫을 것으로 예측했습니다. 관세 정책과 이민 정책이 소매업계에 부담을 주고 있습니다. 이러한 정책들이 더 많은 매장 폐점을 촉진할 수 있다고 경고했습니다.
summary_en: UBS analysts predict more than 40,000 retail store closures over the next five years. Tariff and immigration policies are creating significant pressure on the retail industry. These policy changes could accelerate even more store closures across the sector.
so_what_ko: 물리적 매장의 대규모 폐점은 D2C 브랜드에게 디지털 퍼스트 전략의 중요성을 더욱 부각시킵니다.
so_what_en: Massive physical store closures highlight the critical importance of digital-first strategies for D2C brands.
key_points: 40,000+ store closures predicted over 5 years
Tariffs and immigration policies driving retail pressure
Industry-wide transformation accelerating
one_line_insight_ko: 대규모 매장 폐점은 디지털 네이티브 D2C 브랜드에게 시장 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Massive store closures create market opportunities for digital-native D2C brands.

title: VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap
description:
Apparel and footwear giant VF Corporation is seeking a clearer view of its global inventory as it looks to better sync its digital storefronts with physical availability. The parent company of The North Face, Vans and Timberland said it’s overhauling how it tracks stock across its vast network of stores, distribution centers and supply chain […]
The post VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: VF Corporation implements Nedap inventory visibility technology across global operations
summary_ko: VF Corporation이 Nedap의 재고 가시성 기술을 도입하여 글로벌 재고 관리를 개선하고 있습니다. North Face, Vans, Timberland의 모회사인 이 기업은 디지털 매장과 실제 재고 가용성을 더 잘 동기화하려고 합니다. 전체 매장, 물류센터, 공급망 네트워크에서 재고 추적 방식을 전면 개편하고 있습니다.
summary_en: VF Corporation is implementing Nedap's inventory visibility technology to improve global inventory management. The parent company of North Face, Vans, and Timberland aims to better synchronize digital storefronts with physical availability. The company is overhauling how it tracks stock across its vast network of stores, distribution centers, and supply chain.
so_what_ko: 실시간 재고 가시성은 옴니채널 D2C 운영의 필수 요소로, 고객 경험과 운영 효율성을 동시에 향상시킵니다.
so_what_en: Real-time inventory visibility is essential for omnichannel D2C operations, improving both customer experience and operational efficiency.
key_points: VF Corporation deploying Nedap inventory visibility technology globally
Focus on synchronizing digital and physical inventory availability
Overhaul of stock tracking across stores, distribution centers, and supply chain
one_line_insight_ko: 글로벌 재고 가시성 기술은 D2C 브랜드의 옴니채널 성공을 위한 핵심 인프라입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Global inventory visibility technology is critical infrastructure for D2C omnichannel success.

title: Tractor Supply get help from digital sales in Q1 earnings results
description:
Tractor Supply Company’s fiscal Q1 was dragged down by customers not spending as much on their cats and dogs as they would in a more robust economy, according to CEO Harry Lawton, who spoke with analysts on the retailer’s quarterly earnings call. This is especially true for dog owners. Historically, dry kibble has been a […]
The post Tractor Supply get help from digital sales in Q1 earnings results appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Tractor Supply reports digital sales growth despite pet product slowdown in Q1
summary_ko: Tractor Supply의 1분기 실적은 경기 둔화로 인한 반려동물 용품 지출 감소의 영향을 받았습니다. CEO Harry Lawton에 따르면 특히 강아지 사료 매출이 부진했습니다. 하지만 디지털 판매 성장이 전체 실적을 지지했습니다.
summary_en: Tractor Supply's Q1 performance was impacted by reduced pet product spending due to economic conditions. CEO Harry Lawton noted that dog food sales were particularly affected by the economic downturn. However, digital sales growth helped support overall results.
so_what_ko: 경기 둔화 시에도 디지털 채널은 D2C 브랜드의 성장 동력 역할을 할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Digital channels can serve as growth drivers for D2C brands even during economic downturns.
key_points: Pet product spending declined due to economic conditions
Dog food sales particularly affected by economic downturn
Digital sales growth supported overall Q1 performance
one_line_insight_ko: 경제적 어려움 속에서도 디지털 채널은 D2C 브랜드의 회복력을 보여주는 핵심 지표입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Digital channels demonstrate D2C brand resilience as a key metric during economic challenges.

title: Lululemon names next CEO
description:
In the same week as Apple and Best Buy, Lululemon has announced a succession plan for its CEO, effective in fall 2026. Of the three companies, Lululemon is the only one to name an external candidate as its next CEO. Lululemon said its board of directors unanimously approved Heidi O’Neill as the retailer’s next CEO. […]
The post Lululemon names next CEO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Lululemon Appoints External CEO Heidi O'Neill in Strategic Leadership Transition
summary_ko: 룰루레몬이 2026년 가을부터 새로운 CEO로 하이디 오닐을 임명한다고 발표했습니다. 이는 애플, 베스트바이와 같은 주에 이뤄진 CEO 승계 계획 발표 중 하나입니다. 룰루레몬은 세 회사 중 유일하게 외부 인사를 차기 CEO로 선정했습니다.
summary_en: Lululemon announced the appointment of Heidi O'Neill as its next CEO, effective fall 2026. This announcement came in the same week as CEO succession plans from Apple and Best Buy. Lululemon is the only one among the three companies to select an external candidate for the CEO position.
so_what_ko: 리테일 업계의 리더십 변화는 D2C 브랜드들의 전략적 방향성과 혁신 역량에 영향을 미칠 수 있으며, 특히 외부 인사 영입은 새로운 디지털 커머스 접근법을 시사할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Leadership changes in retail industry can impact strategic direction and innovation capabilities of D2C brands, with external appointments potentially signaling new digital commerce approaches.
key_points: Lululemon selects external CEO candidate Heidi O'Neill
CEO transition effective fall 2026
Part of broader retail industry leadership changes
one_line_insight_ko: 스포츠웨어 리테일러의 외부 CEO 영입은 D2C 전략 혁신의 신호일 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: External CEO appointment at sportswear retailer may signal D2C strategy innovation opportunities.

title: American Industrial Partners to acquire Honeywell warehouse automation
description:
Private equity firm American Industrial Partners (AIP) will acquire the Warehouse and Workflow Solutions (WWS) piece of Honeywell’s business. AIP did not disclose the terms of the deal, which is expected to close in the second half of 2026. Honeywell operates across logistics and warehouses, manufacturing, retail, data centers and other industries. Meanwhile, AIP’s portfolio […]
The post American Industrial Partners to acquire Honeywell warehouse automation appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: American Industrial Partners Acquires Honeywell's Warehouse Automation Division
summary_ko: 사모펀드 아메리칸 인더스트리얼 파트너스가 허니웰의 창고 및 워크플로우 솔루션 사업부를 인수한다고 발표했습니다. 거래 조건은 공개되지 않았으며, 2026년 하반기에 완료될 예정입니다. 허니웰은 물류, 창고, 제조, 리테일, 데이터센터 등 다양한 산업 분야에서 사업을 운영하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Private equity firm American Industrial Partners announced the acquisition of Honeywell's Warehouse and Workflow Solutions business unit. Deal terms were not disclosed, with completion expected in the second half of 2026. Honeywell operates across logistics, warehouses, manufacturing, retail, and data center industries.
so_what_ko: 창고 자동화 기술 분야의 M&A 활동은 D2C 기업들의 풀필먼트 효율성과 비용 구조에 영향을 미칠 수 있으며, 새로운 자동화 솔루션 기회를 창출할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: M&A activity in warehouse automation technology can impact D2C companies' fulfillment efficiency and cost structures, potentially creating new automation solution opportunities.
key_points: AIP acquiring Honeywell's warehouse automation business
Deal expected to close in second half of 2026
Covers logistics, retail, and data center automation
one_line_insight_ko: 창고 자동화 사업의 인수는 D2C 풀필먼트 혁신을 위한 새로운 기술 기회를 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Warehouse automation business acquisition presents new technology opportunities for D2C fulfillment innovation.

title: Best Buy announces successor to CEO
description:
Consumer electronics retailer Best Buy has announced that current CEO Corie Barry will step down from her role at the end of October. That will also be when she steps down from her role as a member of the retailer’s board of directors, tying into when its fiscal Q3 ends on Oct. 31. Jason Bonfig, […]
The post Best Buy announces successor to CEO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry to Step Down, Jason Bonfig Named Successor
summary_ko: 가전제품 리테일러 베스트바이가 현재 CEO인 코리 배리가 10월 말에 사임한다고 발표했습니다. 그녀는 회사 이사회 멤버 역할에서도 동시에 물러날 예정입니다. 이는 회사의 3분기가 끝나는 10월 31일과 맞물려 있습니다.
summary_en: Consumer electronics retailer Best Buy announced that current CEO Corie Barry will step down at the end of October. She will also step down from her role as a board member at the same time. This timing aligns with the end of the company's fiscal Q3 on October 31.
so_what_ko: 가전 리테일 분야의 리더십 변화는 D2C 전자제품 브랜드들의 경쟁 환경과 유통 전략에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Leadership changes in electronics retail may impact competitive landscape and distribution strategies for D2C electronics brands.
key_points: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry stepping down in October
Jason Bonfig named as successor
Timing aligns with end of fiscal Q3
one_line_insight_ko: 가전 리테일 거대 기업의 CEO 교체는 D2C 전자제품 시장의 경쟁 구도 변화를 예고합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Electronics retail giant's CEO transition signals potential competitive landscape shifts for D2C electronics market.

title: Campaign Trail: 1664 taps multiple Robert Pattinsons to examine good taste
description: The beer brand formerly known as Kronenbourg 1664 worked with agency Fold7 and director Brady Corbet to answer “A Question of Good Taste.”
title_en: 1664 Beer Brand Uses Multiple Robert Pattinsons in Creative Campaign Exploring Good Taste
summary_ko: 이전에 크로넨부르크 1664로 알려진 맥주 브랜드가 에이전시 Fold7 및 감독 브래디 코벳과 협력했습니다. 이들은 '좋은 취향에 대한 질문'에 답하는 캠페인을 제작했습니다. 캠페인에서는 여러 명의 로버트 패틴슨이 등장하여 좋은 취향을 탐구합니다.
summary_en: The beer brand formerly known as Kronenbourg 1664 collaborated with agency Fold7 and director Brady Corbet. They created a campaign to answer 'A Question of Good Taste'. The campaign features multiple Robert Pattinsons to examine the concept of good taste.
so_what_ko: 크리에이티브 캠페인에서 유명 인사를 활용한 혁신적 접근법은 D2C 브랜드들의 마케팅 전략과 브랜드 인식 개선에 참고할 만한 사례입니다.
so_what_en: Innovative celebrity utilization in creative campaigns provides reference cases for D2C brands' marketing strategies and brand perception improvement.
key_points: 1664 beer brand creative campaign with multiple Robert Pattinsons
Collaboration with agency Fold7 and director Brady Corbet
Campaign explores concept of 'good taste'
one_line_insight_ko: 유명인 활용한 창의적 캠페인은 D2C 브랜드 스토리텔링의 새로운 가능성을 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Creative celebrity campaigns present new possibilities for D2C brand storytelling approaches.

title: Why relevance now beats reach in the AI-driven buyer journey
description:
Buyers are forming opinions before they click. Learn how to show up in AI answers, earn trust in peer networks, and influence decisions earlier.
The post Why relevance now beats reach in the AI-driven buyer journey appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI-Driven Buyer Journey Prioritizes Relevance Over Reach in Marketing Strategy
summary_ko: AI 주도의 구매자 여정에서 도달 범위보다 관련성이 더 중요해지고 있습니다. 구매자들은 클릭하기 전에 이미 의견을 형성하고 있습니다. 마케터들은 AI 답변에 노출되고, 동료 네트워크에서 신뢰를 얻으며, 더 일찍 결정에 영향을 미치는 방법을 배워야 합니다.
summary_en: In AI-driven buyer journeys, relevance is becoming more important than reach in marketing strategy. Buyers are forming opinions before they click on content. Marketers need to learn how to appear in AI answers, earn trust in peer networks, and influence decisions earlier in the process.
so_what_ko: AI 시대의 구매자 여정 변화는 D2C 브랜드들이 도달 중심에서 관련성 중심의 마케팅 전략으로 전환해야 함을 시사하며, 초기 구매 단계에서의 영향력 확보가 핵심입니다.
so_what_en: AI-era buyer journey changes suggest D2C brands must shift from reach-focused to relevance-focused marketing strategies, with early-stage purchase influence being crucial.
key_points: Relevance becomes more important than reach in AI-driven marketing
Buyers form opinions before clicking on content
Need to influence decisions earlier in the buyer journey
Importance of appearing in AI answers and peer networks
one_line_insight_ko: AI 시대에는 마케팅의 패러다임이 도달에서 관련성으로 근본적으로 변화하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI era fundamentally shifts marketing paradigm from reach to relevance as the primary success metric.

title: 15 HubSpot updates from March 2026 managers and admins need to know
description:
The March updates focus on giving teams more flexibility, more precise control over automation and timing.
The post 15 HubSpot updates from March 2026 managers and admins need to know appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: HubSpot March 2026 Updates Enhance Marketing Automation Flexibility and Control
summary_ko: HubSpot이 2026년 3월 업데이트를 통해 마케팅 팀에게 더 큰 유연성과 정밀한 자동화 제어 기능을 제공합니다. 이번 업데이트는 관리자와 매니저들이 알아야 할 15가지 주요 개선사항을 포함합니다. 마케팅 자동화의 타이밍과 워크플로우 제어가 크게 향상되었습니다.
summary_en: HubSpot's March 2026 updates provide marketing teams with enhanced flexibility and more precise control over automation workflows. The updates include 15 key improvements that managers and administrators need to understand for optimal platform utilization. Marketing automation timing and workflow control capabilities have been significantly enhanced.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 향상된 HubSpot 자동화 기능을 활용하여 고객 여정을 더욱 정교하게 관리하고 개인화된 마케팅 경험을 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage enhanced HubSpot automation features to more precisely manage customer journeys and deliver personalized marketing experiences.
key_points: HubSpot introduced 15 major updates focused on automation flexibility
Enhanced timing and workflow control capabilities for marketing teams
Improved administrative controls for better campaign management
one_line_insight_ko: HubSpot의 자동화 기능 향상으로 D2C 브랜드의 마케팅 정밀도가 높아질 것으로 예상됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: HubSpot's automation enhancements will enable greater marketing precision for D2C brands.

title: From permission to personalization: Activating first-party data the right way
description:
On May 6th, learn how to activate first-party data to drive measurable results without compromising customer trust or safety.
The post From permission to personalization: Activating first-party data the right way appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: First-Party Data Activation: Balancing Personalization with Customer Trust
summary_ko: 퍼스트파티 데이터를 활용한 개인화 마케팅의 올바른 접근법에 대한 가이드가 제시됩니다. 고객의 신뢰와 안전을 손상시키지 않으면서도 측정 가능한 성과를 창출하는 방법이 핵심입니다. 5월 6일 세션에서 실전 활용법이 공개될 예정입니다.
summary_en: A guide presents the right approach to personalization marketing using first-party data. The key is generating measurable results while maintaining customer trust and safety. Practical implementation methods will be revealed in a May 6th session.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 퍼스트파티 데이터 활용 전략을 재검토하여 고객 신뢰를 유지하면서도 개인화 수준을 높일 수 있는 균형점을 찾아야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must reassess their first-party data strategies to find the balance between enhanced personalization and maintaining customer trust.
key_points: Focus on activating first-party data without compromising trust
Emphasis on measurable results while ensuring customer safety
Upcoming session on practical implementation strategies
one_line_insight_ko: 퍼스트파티 데이터 활용의 성공 열쇠는 개인화와 고객 신뢰 간의 균형에 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The key to first-party data success lies in balancing personalization with customer trust.

title: Generative engine optimization KPIs that actually matter for marketing teams
description: Generative AI is changing how people discover brands, products, and information. Because it disrupts the buyer journey, it requires new metrics, specifically GEO KPIs, that accurately reflect performance within these AI engines.
title_en: Generative Engine Optimization KPIs Transform Marketing Performance Measurement
summary_ko: 생성형 AI가 브랜드와 제품 발견 방식을 변화시키면서 새로운 성과 측정 지표가 필요해졌습니다. 기존 구매 여정이 파괴되면서 AI 엔진 내 성과를 정확히 반영하는 GEO KPI가 중요해지고 있습니다. 마케팅 팀은 생성형 엔진 최적화를 위한 새로운 지표를 도입해야 합니다.
summary_en: Generative AI is changing how people discover brands and products, requiring new performance measurement metrics. The disruption of traditional buyer journeys necessitates GEO KPIs that accurately reflect performance within AI engines. Marketing teams must adopt new metrics for generative engine optimization.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 기존 SEO 중심의 성과 지표를 넘어 생성형 AI 엔진에서의 브랜드 노출과 성과를 측정할 수 있는 GEO KPI를 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop GEO KPIs to measure brand exposure and performance in generative AI engines, beyond traditional SEO-focused metrics.
key_points: Generative AI disrupts traditional buyer journey and discovery methods
New GEO KPIs required to measure performance in AI engines
Marketing teams need updated measurement frameworks
one_line_insight_ko: 생성형 AI 시대에는 전통적인 마케팅 KPI를 넘어 AI 엔진 내 성과를 측정하는 새로운 지표가 필수입니다.
one_line_insight_en: In the generative AI era, new metrics measuring performance within AI engines are essential beyond traditional marketing KPIs.

title: Why agentic storefronts are the future of commerce
description: Digital commerce is at a turning point. As artificial intelligence evolves, it is no longer simply a tool to support retail transactions behind the scenes. Instead, it is becoming a leading channel through which consumers discover products and make purchases. Major technology companies like Google and Microsoft are integrating AI agents into their search, browsing […]
title_en: Agentic Storefronts Emerge as the Future of AI-Powered Commerce
summary_ko: AI 에이전트가 단순한 거래 지원 도구를 넘어 소비자가 제품을 발견하고 구매하는 주요 채널로 발전하고 있습니다. 구글과 마이크로소프트 같은 기술 기업들이 AI 에이전트를 검색과 브라우징에 통합하고 있습니다. 에이전틱 스토어프론트가 디지털 커머스의 전환점이 될 것으로 예상됩니다.
summary_en: AI agents are evolving beyond transaction support tools to become primary channels for product discovery and purchases. Major technology companies like Google and Microsoft are integrating AI agents into search and browsing experiences. Agentic storefronts represent a turning point for digital commerce.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통적인 이커머스 플랫폼 외에 AI 에이전트 기반의 새로운 판매 채널을 준비하고 에이전틱 커머스 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must prepare for new AI agent-based sales channels beyond traditional e-commerce platforms and develop agentic commerce strategies.
key_points: AI agents becoming primary channels for product discovery and purchase
Major tech companies integrating AI agents into search and browsing
Agentic storefronts represent a digital commerce turning point
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트가 새로운 커머스 채널로 부상하면서 D2C 브랜드의 판매 전략 혁신이 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: As AI agents emerge as new commerce channels, D2C brands need to innovate their sales strategies.

title: [AINews] DeepSeek V4 Pro (1.6T-A49B) and Flash (284B-A13B), Base and Instruct — runnable on Huawei Ascend chips
description: The prodigal Tiger returns... but is no longer the benchmarks leader.
title_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro and Flash Models Launch with Huawei Ascend Chip Support
summary_ko: DeepSeek이 V4 Pro(1.6T-A49B)와 Flash(284B-A13B) 모델을 출시하며 Base와 Instruct 버전을 제공합니다. 이 모델들은 화웨이 Ascend 칩에서 실행 가능하도록 설계되었습니다. 그러나 더 이상 벤치마크 리더 위치에 있지 않는 것으로 평가됩니다.
summary_en: DeepSeek launches V4 Pro (1.6T-A49B) and Flash (284B-A13B) models, offering both Base and Instruct versions. These models are designed to run on Huawei Ascend chips. However, they are no longer considered benchmark leaders in the field.
so_what_ko: 중국 AI 모델의 발전과 화웨이 칩 생태계 확장은 글로벌 AI 인프라 경쟁 구도 변화를 시사하지만, D2C 비즈니스에 직접적인 영향은 제한적입니다.
so_what_en: The advancement of Chinese AI models and Huawei chip ecosystem expansion signals changes in global AI infrastructure competition, but has limited direct impact on D2C business.
key_points: DeepSeek releases V4 Pro and Flash models with Huawei chip support
Models available in both Base and Instruct versions
No longer maintaining benchmark leadership position
one_line_insight_ko: 중국 AI 모델 발전은 글로벌 AI 생태계 다변화를 보여주지만 현재 D2C 비즈니스 관련성은 낮습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Chinese AI model development shows global AI ecosystem diversification but currently has low D2C business relevance.
